triage_rows.detail: This supervision step only changes the internal sell ladder inside the existing broader-hit boundary.
Reversal sell-fraction tuning remains a phase-2 shadow refinement only.

interpretation: V1.34AD converts the reversal sell-fraction audit into the next local supervision judgment.
The branch is only allowed to promote a different fraction if the same-day-loss-avoided improvement is positive without changing the existing broader-hit surface boundary.
